step_rationale: Bone-mineral metabolism marker, off atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: MEPE reflects systemic mineral metabolism and bone remodeling concurrent with MI but not a direct cascade mediator.

references.title: Novel multi-marker proteomics in phenotypically matched patients with ST-segment myocardial infarction: association with clinical outcomes.
High-throughput targeted proteomics discovery approach and spontaneous reperfusion in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
